analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the website. The theme should focus on black holes, with animated objects, slides, and pages. The CSS file needs to be updated to include the full intended dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file needs to be updated to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality, and to add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in the HTML file.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality, and add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in the HTML file.
